allow: PowerShell(python -c "import sys; print\(sys.executable\); import numpy; print\('numpy OK', numpy.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path ".venv"\) { Get-ChildItem .venv } else { Write-Output "no .venv" }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "venv|env" } | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(python -m pip install --quiet biopython==1.84 matplotlib==3.9.2 memory-profiler==0.61.0 numpy==2.1.3 scipy==1.14.1 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m pip install --quiet biopython matplotlib memory-profiler numpy scipy 2>&1)

Bash(until [ -s "/c/Users/frank/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/c--fespa-uni-Computacional-PARCIAL-BIO-COMPUTACIONAL/9f2d4e01-4ce2-431d-ae3f-d6a09c542b65/tasks/bk00w241x.output" ] && tail -1 "/c/Users/frank/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/c--fespa-uni-Computacional-PARCIAL-BIO-COMPUTACIONAL/9f2d4e01-4ce2-431d-ae3f-d6a09c542b65/tasks/bk00w241x.output" | grep -q "\\-\\-\\-\\|alignments returned\\|Error\\|Traceback"; do sleep 10; done; echo "DONE")
PowerShell(Write-Output \("cwd=" + \(Get-Location\).Path\); Get-ChildItem output/ | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name,LastWriteTime,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(python -u main_p2.py 2>&1 | Out-File output/_main_p2_log.txt -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content output/_main_p2_log.txt | Select-Object -Last 60)
PowerShell(python -u main_p2.py 2>&1 | Out-File output/_main_p2_log.txt -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content output/_main_p2_log.txt | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell(Set-Location ../informe; pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode informe.tex 2>&1 | Out-File _build.log -Encoding utf8; pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode informe.tex 2>&1 | Out-File _build.log -Encoding utf8 -Append; Get-Content _build.log | Select-String -Pattern "Error|Warning|Overfull|! |No file" | Select-Object -First 30; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output \("PDF: " + \(Test-Path informe.pdf\) + " size=" + \(Get-Item informe.pdf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length\))
